name: Baku the Beast Ninja
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けもの</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>獏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned or flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ninja" or "Ninjitsu Art" card from your GY or face-up Spell & Trap Zone, except "Baku the Beast Ninja"; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Baku the Beast Ninja" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned or flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ninja" or "Ninjitsu Art" card from your GY or face-up Spell & Trap Zone, except "Baku the Beast Ninja"; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Baku the Beast Ninja" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon it. If this card is Special Summoned or flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Ninja" or "Ninjitsu Art" card from your GY or face-up Spell & Trap Zone, except "Baku the Beast Ninja"; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Baku the Beast Ninja" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Activates if added to the hand
Returns from your field to your hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
